title: Ice Route Practice
intendedTensionBeat: The player has multiple valid clears, but only the iced route advances rescue efficiently.
intendedReleaseBeat: A clean ice break opens the rescue lane and produces a satisfying visible target-state improvement.
expectedPath: Use one dock-safe clear to expose the ice-adjacent route, break the ice, then finish the rescue before broad side clears matter.
expectedFailMode: Player treats ice as optional cleanup, fills dock with side material, and delays the only meaningful route.
designNotes: First real-board repetition of L21. Add one crate only if it clarifies route shape rather than adding noise.
